text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After several hours of waiting, Tosen Jordan still
hasn't turned up for training. Feeling a little
concerned, I go to look for her, and...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Crap! I totally forgot. Soooo sorry!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I just couldn't get this new grape frappe out of my
head. Hehehe... ☆

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, yikes. It didn't even cross my mind how
long I kept you waiting.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I'll be more careful from now on—promise! How
about I get you a snack or something as an
apology?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad everything is okay, but she seems to be
slacking off, so I give her a stern talking-to.
